prompt: Create a vertical dark fantasy cyberpunk anime illustration of two full-body characters walking toward the viewer through a shattered digital city at night. The scene contains exactly 2 main characters: a tall male-presenting figure on the left and a slightly shorter female-presenting figure on the right. The left character has messy black hair, a slim elegant build, an all-black gothic suit with a long torn feathered coat, sharp layered lapels, belts, gloves, boots, dangling chains, glossy armor-like details, and violet highlights; his left hand is raised in a graceful open gesture. The right character has long flowing platinum-blonde hair, a pale elegant build, a revealing black-and-lavender gothic dress with a high slit, translucent flowing sleeves and cape panels, ornate black metallic chest ornaments, thigh straps, jewelry-like accents, and pointed heels. Add exactly 2 opaque square face-obscuring blocks, one centered over each character’s face, in muted purple-gray tones. The background is a ruined futuristic megacity filled with glitch artifacts, vertical neon data streaks, cracked reality-like lightning fractures, reflective wet pavement, and floating broken architectural fragments; include exactly 7 prominent debris pieces: two large slabs at the upper right, one hovering craft-like fragment near the upper center-right, one dark platform on the left edge, one flat shard on the mid-right edge, one broken chunk near the lower left, and one dark slab near the lower right. Use a palette of deep black, violet, indigo, lavender, electric purple, and scattered chromatic RGB glitch speckles. Lighting should be dramatic and backlit, with high contrast, iridescent reflections, intricate painterly detail, torn fabric motion, and a melancholic apocalyptic atmosphere. Style: highly detailed Japanese anime key visual, gothic couture, cyberpunk ruin, painterly digital art, cinematic composition, no text, no watermark.
